"/usr/bin/ar" qc libvep_annotator_lib.a CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/vep_annotator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/file_parsers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/plugin_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/dbnsfp_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/spliceai_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/maxentscan_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/dbscsnv_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/conservation_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/regulatory_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/domain_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vep_annotator_lib.dir/src/sources/lof_source.cpp.o
"/usr/bin/ranlib" libvep_annotator_lib.a
